blocks.body: Future Continuous: Negatives — will not be + verb-ing for things that will not be happening at a future moment.

{"level":"B1","intro":"To make negatives in Future Continuous, we use will not be + verb-ing or the short form won't be + verb-ing.","rules":[{"label":"Negative form","color":"emerald","text":"Basic pattern: subject + will not be + verb-ing.","example":"I will not be working at 8 p.m."},{"label":"Won't be","color":"blue","text":"In speech and simple writing, won't be is very common.","example":"She won't be staying late tomorrow."},{"label":"Meaning","color":"amber","text":"We use it to show that the action will not be in progress at that future time or period.","example":"They won't be using the office next week."}]}

{"title":"1. How to build negatives","intro":"The form does not change with the subject. Only the negative after will changes.","items":[{"label":"Full form","title":"will not be + verb-ing","subtitle":"He will not be waiting for us then."},{"label":"Short form","title":"won't be + verb-ing","subtitle":"We won't be travelling tomorrow night."},{"label":"All subjects","title":"I / you / he / she / it / we / they","subtitle":"The structure stays the same in every case."},{"label":"Meaning","title":"not in progress","subtitle":"We highlight that the process will not be happening then."}]}

{"title":"2. When negatives are useful","sections":[{"label":"The action will not be in progress","color":"emerald","description":"Show that the action will not be happening at a specific future moment.","examples":[{"en":"At 9 p.m., I won't be checking my email.","ua":"At that time, the action will not be happening."},{"en":"This time tomorrow, they won't be sitting in the office.","ua":"The situation will be different at that future point."}]},{"label":"A changed plan or situation","color":"blue","description":"The form works well when you explain that a future activity is not part of the plan.","examples":[{"en":"We won't be staying at the hotel after Friday.","ua":"A future arrangement or situation will not happen."},{"en":"She won't be working all day tomorrow.","ua":"We are denying a longer future action."}]},{"label":"Soft unavailability","color":"amber","description":"Future Continuous negative can sound softer when you explain that you will not be available.","examples":[{"en":"I won't be using the car tonight, so you can take it.","ua":"A calm explanation about future availability."},{"en":"He won't be joining us later.","ua":"We say that the person will not be part of the plan."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Typical negative patterns","intro":"Look at the most common models.","rows":[{"en":"I won't be working tomorrow evening.","ua":"won't be working","note":"the future action will not happen"},{"en":"She will not be waiting outside.","ua":"will not be waiting","note":"the full form sounds more formal"},{"en":"We won't be staying there next week.","ua":"won't be staying","note":"negative future situation"},{"en":"They won't be talking during the meeting.","ua":"won't be talking","note":"we highlight the absence of the process"}],"warning":"Remember that after won't be, you need the verb-ing form, not the base verb."}

{"title":"4. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Leaving out be after won't.","wrong":"❌ She won't working tomorrow.","right":"✅ She won't be working tomorrow."},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Using V1 instead of verb-ing.","wrong":"❌ We won't be stay late.","right":"✅ We won't be staying late."},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Putting not after be.","wrong":"❌ They will be not waiting.","right":"✅ They will not be waiting."}]}

{"title":"5. Short summary","items":["The negative in Future Continuous = will not be + verb-ing.","Short form: won't be + verb-ing.","This form shows that the action will not be in progress at that future time or period.","After won't be, do not use the base verb without -ing."]}
